LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF MR. JOHN HASSEL'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT AS A MATTER OF LAW AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ESTABLISH A BASIS FOR RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/EHG

calendar.matters:
Motion For Judgment As A Matter Of Law And Request For Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - DR. JOHN A. HASSEL, TEL. NO. 1-415-558-8589, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AND THE COURT and the moving papers were unintelligible. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MR. JOHN HASSEL's Motion For Judgment As A Matter Of Law And Request For Entry Of Default is Denied. Plaintiff fails to establish a basis for relief. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
